left.geometry_guidance: The visible wall face should favor the left side of the isometric view and keep the base anchored exactly to the reference silhouette

right.geometry_guidance: The visible wall face should favor the right side of the isometric view and keep the base anchored exactly to the reference silhouette

prompt: pixel art style dungeon stone wall with readable block seams, restrained shading, and no extra props
negative_prompt: no scene background, no cast shadow, no floor tile attached, no extra props, no border, no text, no watermark, no shape deformation
generator_notes: preserve the same wall family between left and right variants
